description: Fired when a user authenticates via the /auth/session endpoint. Also triggers an identify call to set user properties.
Fired when a user creates a new SaaS project.
Fired when a project's settings (name, rate limit) are updated.
Fired when a project is permanently deleted.
Fired when end-user feedback (bug/feature/feedback) is submitted to a project via the SDK.
Fired when a project owner updates the status of a feedback item.
Fired when a project owner deletes a feedback item.
Fired when an end-user signs up to a project's waitlist.
Fired when an end-user submits a testimonial for a project (both via API key and public slug).
Fired when a user creates a new task.
Fired when a task's status is changed.
Fired when a task is deleted.
